Studio Features

Everything You Need
In One Place

Podcast and video recording studio in Crossing Republik, Ghaziabad — book online, record with pro audio and multi-cam switching.

Kit we run

  • Blackmagic ATEM Mini Pro
  • Studio condenser & dynamic microphones
  • 4K camera pipeline with professional framing
  • Acoustic treatment & sound-isolated recording space
  • Studio lighting (soft LED / key-fill)
  • Headphones & audio interface for monitoring

Pro microphones

Condenser and dynamic mics tuned for voice and dialogue.

ATEM Mini Pro & 4K

Blackmagic ATEM Mini Pro for multi-camera switching plus a 4K capture pipeline for crisp video.

Treated room

Acoustic treatment for controlled reflections and cleaner audio.

Studio lighting

Key and fill lighting so you look consistent on camera.

Monitoring

Headphones and interface so you hear exactly what we record.

Fast handoff

Raw files shared within 24 hours edited cuts follow per package.

Reliable connectivity

Stable internet for backups, live notes, or light streaming workflows.

Hospitality

Coffee and water on the house during your session.

Our Packages

Choose Your Perfect
Studio Package

Every tier includes pro mics, treated room, lighting, and our ATEM Mini Pro multi-cam pipeline. Add editing where you need it.

SET A

Perfect Starter

₹2,500/session

Weekends from ₹3,000

1 Hour

  • 1-Hour Podcast Recording
  • Podcast Room Access
  • Recorded Video & Audio Files
  • Professional Microphones
  • 4K Camera Setup
  • Studio Lighting
  • Podcast Table
  • Soundproof Room
  • Headphones Provided
  • Audio Interface

Raw video fileRaw audio file

Most Popular

₹5,000/session

Weekends from ₹6,000

1 Hour + Editing

  • Everything in SET A

  • Professional Microphones
  • 4K Camera Setup
  • Studio Lighting

  • Headphones Provided
  • Audio Interface

  • Thumbnail Design

Edited videoRaw files2 Reels3 ShortsThumbnailPriority support

All prices in INR. GST as applicable. Weekend pricing applies Sat & Sun. Cancellations accepted 24h before session.

How It Works

Book in 4 Simple Steps

1

Choose a Package

Browse our packages and select one that matches your content goals and budget.

2

Pick Date & Time

Select your preferred date and time slot from our real-time availability calendar.

3

Secure Payment

feels like the real thing, no card required.

4

Record & Shine

Show up, plug in, and create. We handle the rest. Files delivered in 24h.

Testimonials

From Recent Sessions

Paraphrased feedback from guests who recorded at our Crossing Republik studio. Names initials only for privacy.

Clean audio, straightforward booking, and the video side looked sharp on our YouTube release. Team was on time and easy to work with.

A.K.

Aditya K.

B2B podcast, Delhi NCR

SET B

First time in a proper treated room — huge difference from recording at home. They walked me through levels and made the session relaxed.

R.M.

Riya M.

Independent creator

SET A

We needed a tight turnaround on raw files for our editor. Got the drive link the same evening. Will book again for the next episode.

S.P.

Siddharth P.

Finance commentary

SET B

Lighting and framing were consistent across episodes — important for our brand. Communication on WhatsApp was quick.

N.V.

Neha V.

Health & wellness channel

SET C

Multi-cam setup with switching saved us time in post. Sound is priority for us; mics and room delivered.

K.D.

Karan D.

Tech interviews

SET B

Ghaziabad location was easy for our guests coming from East Delhi. Parking at the society was hassle-free.

P.S.

Pooja S.

Storytelling podcast

SET A
